item.title: Why progressives choose conservative baby names
item.description: The affluent may say they dislike convention. But they name their kids Charles, Eleanor and Henry.

item.title: Socialism is back in vogue. Wait for reality to set in.
item.description: Taxing the rich sounds good, until they move away.

item.title: Trump’s payout fund was dropped. Now it’s time to ask questions.
item.description: Readers on immigration court, funding transparency, Congress, federalism and more.

item.title: The cycle of rooting for your team every World Cup
item.description: Edith Pritchett cartoon on fans' hopes.

item.title: Trump achieved a historic victory in Iran. His deal risks squandering it.
item.description: His agreement is nothing like Obama’s, but it gives the regime an opening to recover.

item.title: Pete Hegseth’s reckless vaccine policy backfires with flu outbreak
item.description: The Defense secretary is forcing society to relearn costly lessons of history.

item.title: Championship victories shouldn’t trigger destruction
item.description: Post readers on the Knicks, sports betting, camp and more.
